Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to a critical host. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} accessed new shared network resource "{object.storage.path}" on critical host {event_src.host}. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to critical host {event_src.host}. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.
